lifecycleScripts.afterStart: wp-env run cli -- wp theme activate wp-theme-soli && wp-env run cli -- wp option update blogname 'Muziekvereniging Soli' && wp-env run cli -- wp option update blogdescription 'Driehuis sinds 1909' && wp-env run tests-cli -- wp theme activate wp-theme-soli && wp-env run tests-cli -- wp option update blogname 'Muziekvereniging Soli' && wp-env run tests-cli -- wp option update blogdescription 'Driehuis sinds 1909'
